content: Smart allocation approaches: Digit auto-analyses income/expenses and moves micro-amounts without confirmation; Qapital uses user-defined rules (e.g., 'save 10% of any side income') and fires automatically; Plum's AI finds 'safe amounts' and auto-transfers every few days; Monzo rounds up to nearest pound automatically. All four are AUTO-EXECUTE. Suggest-and-confirm is the less common but more trust-appropriate pattern for new users — research shows users want to feel control over money movements; fully automated approaches work after trust is established over months.
